mapper.select: SELECT 'RC_CF_TR' as recommendPanelContentType, a.rcmmd_mforu_id as recommendId, a.disp_std_end_dt as avaliableDateTime, a.disp_sn as dispSn, 0 as moodId, count(a.rcmmd_mforu_id) contentCount FROM tb_rcmmd_mforu a INNER JOIN tb_rcmmd_mforu_list b ON a.rcmmd_mforu_id = b.rcmmd_mforu_id INNER JOIN tb_track c ON b.track_id = c.track_id AND c.disp_status_yn = 'Y' AND now() BETWEEN c.disp_start_dtime AND c.disp_end_dtime WHERE a.character_no = #{characterNo} AND NOW() BETWEEN a.disp_std_start_dt AND a.disp_std_end_dt GROUP BY a.rcmmd_mforu_id HAVING contentCount >= #{rcmmdCfTrackDispStandardCount} UNION ALL SELECT 'RC_SML_TR' as recommendPanelContentType, a.rcmmd_similar_track_id as recommendId, a.disp_std_end_dt as avaliableDateTime, a.disp_sn as dispSn, 0 as moodId, count(b.rcmmd_similar_track_id) contentCount FROM tb_rcmmd_similar_track a INNER JOIN tb_rcmmd_similar_track_list b ON a.rcmmd_similar_track_id = b.rcmmd_similar_track_id INNER JOIN tb_track c ON b.track_id = c.track_id AND c.disp_status_yn = 'Y' AND now() BETWEEN c.disp_start_dtime AND c.disp_end_dtime WHERE a.character_no =#{characterNo} AND a.disp_std_start_dt <= NOW() AND a.disp_std_end_dt >= NOW() GROUP BY a.rcmmd_similar_track_id HAVING contentCount >= #{similarTrackDispStandardCount} UNION ALL SELECT 'RC_ATST_TR' as recommendPanelContentType, rcmmd_artist_id as recommendId, disp_std_end_dt as avaliableDateTime, disp_sn as dispSn, 0 as moodId, 0 as contentCount FROM tb_rcmmd_artist WHERE character_no = #{characterNo} AND disp_std_start_dt <= NOW() AND disp_std_end_dt >= NOW() UNION ALL SELECT 'RC_MD_CN' as recommendPanelContentType, rcmmd_listen_mood_id as recommendId, disp_std_end_dt as avaliableDateTime, disp_sn as dispSn, category_id as moodId, 0 as contentCount FROM tb_rcmmd_listen_mood WHERE character_no = #{characterNo} AND disp_std_start_dt <= NOW() AND disp_std_end_dt >= NOW() UNION ALL SELECT 'RC_GR_TR' as recommendPanelContentType, rcmmd_prefer_genre_similar_track_id as recommendId, disp_std_end_dt as avaliableDateTime, disp_sn as dispSn, 0 as moodId, 0 as contentCount FROM tb_rcmmd_prefer_genre_similar_track WHERE character_no = #{characterNo} AND disp_std_start_dt <= NOW() AND disp_std_end_dt >= NOW()

SELECT a.rcmmd_artist_id, b.artist_id , b.artist_type, c.artist_nm, d.size, d.url, a.create_dtime, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_rcmmd_artist_track_list aa JOIN tb_track bb ON bb.track_id = aa.track_id AND bb.disp_status_yn = 'Y' AND now() BETWEEN bb.disp_start_dtime AND bb.disp_end_dtime WHERE aa.rcmmd_artist_id = #{recommendArtistId} ) trackCount FROM tb_rcmmd_artist a INNER JOIN tb_rcmmd_artist_list b ON a.rcmmd_artist_id = b.rcmmd_artist_id INNER JOIN ted_artist c ON b.artist_id = c.artist_id LEFT OUTER JOIN ted_artistimage d ON c.artist_id = d.artist_id WHERE a.rcmmd_artist_id = #{recommendArtistId} ORDER BY b.disp_sn ASC
SELECT os_type, img_size size, img_url url, disp_sn FROM tb_rcmmd_img_mang WHERE rcmmd_type_id = 'ALL' AND dfk_type = 'EVERY' AND img_disp_type = 'DEFAULT'
SELECT GENRE_ID, count(*) AS GENRE_CNT FROM TB_CHARACTER_PREFER_ARTIST WHERE CHARACTER_NO = #{characterNo} GROUP BY GENRE_ID
SELECT CHARACTER_NO, GENRE_TYPE, GENRE_ID, ARTIST_ID FROM TB_CHARACTER_PREFER_ARTIST WHERE CHARACTER_NO = #{characterNo} AND GENRE_ID = #{genreId} GROUP BY CHARACTER_NO, ARTIST_ID ORDER BY ARTIST_ID

SELECT MSGT.SVC_GENRE_ID , MSGT.TRACK_ID FROM TB_CHARACTER_PREFER_GENRE CPG INNER JOIN TB_MAP_PREFER_GENRE_SVC_GENRE MPGSG ON CPG.PREFER_GENRE_ID = MPGSG.PREFER_GENRE_ID INNER JOIN TB_MAP_SVC_GENRE_TRACK MSGT ON MPGSG.SVC_GENRE_ID = MSGT.SVC_GENRE_ID INNER JOIN ( SELECT CHARACTER_NO, TRACK_ID, TOTAL_LIST_CNT FROM ( SELECT LISTEN_CNT.CHARACTER_NO, LISTEN_CNT.TRACK_ID, CASE WHEN CL.LIKE_TYPE IS NOT NULL THEN LISTEN_CNT.TOTAL_LISTEN_CNT + 10 ELSE LISTEN_CNT.TOTAL_LISTEN_CNT END AS TOTAL_LIST_CNT FROM ( SELECT CHARACTER_NO, TRACK_ID, SUM(LISTEN_CNT) AS TOTAL_LISTEN_CNT FROM TB_MOST_LISTEN_TRACK_BYDAY WHERE CHARACTER_NO = #{characterNo} AND LISTEN_DT >= ADDDATE(CURDATE(), -7) GROUP BY CHARACTER_NO, TRACK_ID ORDER BY NULL) LISTEN_CNT LEFT JOIN TB_CHARACTER_LIKE CL ON LISTEN_CNT.TRACK_ID = CL.LIKE_TYPE_ID AND CL.LIKE_TYPE = 'TRACK' AND CL.UPDATE_DTIME >= date_format(ADDDATE(CURDATE(), -7), '%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00') AND CL.CHARACTER_NO = #{characterNo}) J WHERE J.TOTAL_LIST_CNT >= 3) D ON MSGT.TRACK_ID = D.TRACK_ID WHERE CPG.CHARACTER_NO = #{characterNo} ORDER BY D.TOTAL_LIST_CNT DESC
SELECT b.svc_genre_nm, a.disp_std_start_dt FROM tb_rcmmd_mforu a INNER JOIN tb_svc_genre b ON a.svc_genre_id = b.svc_genre_id WHERE a.rcmmd_mforu_id = #{rcmmdId}

SELECT COUNT(*) duplicateCount, rcmmdId FROM ( SELECT COUNT(b.track_id) duplicateCount, MAX(a.rcmmd_similar_track_id) rcmmdId FROM tb_rcmmd_similar_track a INNER JOIN tb_rcmmd_similar_track_list b ON a.rcmmd_similar_track_id = b.rcmmd_similar_track_id INNER JOIN tb_track c ON b.track_id = c.track_id AND c.disp_status_yn = 'Y' AND now() BETWEEN c.disp_start_dtime AND c.disp_end_dtime WHERE a.character_no = #{characterNo} AND a.disp_std_start_dt <= NOW() AND a.disp_std_end_dt >= NOW() GROUP BY b.track_id HAVING duplicateCount >= 2 ) a

SELECT COUNT(*) duplicateCount, rcmmdId FROM ( SELECT COUNT(b.track_id) duplicateCount, MAX(a.rcmmd_prefer_genre_similar_track_id) rcmmdId FROM tb_rcmmd_prefer_genre_similar_track a INNER JOIN tb_rcmmd_prefer_genre_similar_track_list b ON a.rcmmd_prefer_genre_similar_track_id = b.rcmmd_prefer_genre_similar_track_id INNER JOIN tb_track c ON b.track_id = c.track_id AND c.disp_status_yn = 'Y' AND now() BETWEEN c.disp_start_dtime AND c.disp_end_dtime WHERE character_no = #{characterNo} AND disp_std_start_dt <= NOW() AND disp_std_end_dt >= NOW() GROUP BY b.track_id HAVING duplicateCount >=2 ) a
